zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery於1153年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利時，他的父親Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres23歲，母親Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry9歲。他於從1200年1月8日到1201年1月7日與Beatrix de Châlon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1234年享年81歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery于1153年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利时，他的父亲Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres23岁，母亲Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry9岁。他于从1200年1月8日到1201年1月7日与Beatrix de Châlon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1234年享年81岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Aleksander, Andrzej, Casimir, Ignacy, Jerzy, Krystyna, Krzysztof, Malgorzata, Mikolaj, Stanislaw, Tadeusz.
Polish: from a pet form of the personal name Dionizy, Polish form of Dionysius (see Dennis ).

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

nameMeanings.name: Barres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Francisco, Juan, Ana, Arturo, Javier, Jorge, Julio, Luis, Pedro, Ricardo.
Spanish: habitational name from Batres in Madrid province.

variants.name: Batrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish   Batres  .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery was born in 1153, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, was 23 and his mother, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, was 9. He married Beatrix de Châlon from 8 January 1200 to 7 January 1201. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1234, at the age of 81, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery est né en 1153, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Châlon du 8 janvier 1200 au 7 janvier 1201. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1234, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery 1153 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres 23 und seine Mutter Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry 9. Er hat von 8. Januar 1200 bis 7. Januar 1201 Beatrix de Châlon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1234 im Alter von 81 Jahren und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery è nato il nel 1153 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Châlon da 8 gennaio 1200 a 7 gennaio 1201. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1234, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oisseryが1153年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barresは23歳，母Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitryは9歳であった。から1200年1月8日まで1201年1月7日にBeatrix de Châlonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1234年に81歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery(이)가 1153년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry(은)는 9세였다. 그는 1200년 1월 8일부터 1201년 1월 7일까지 Beatrix de Châlon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1234년 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.1200: de 8 de janeiro de 1200 a 7 de janeiro de 1201
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery nasceu em 1153, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Châlon de 8 de janeiro de 1200 a 7 de janeiro de 1201. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1234, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery родился в 1153 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Châlon с 8 января 1200 по 7 января 1201. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1234 г. в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.1200: desde 8 de enero de 1200 hasta 7 de enero de 1201
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume III des Barres Seigneur d'Oissery nació en 1153, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Guillaume II “l'Achille de son temps” des Barres, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Hélissente de Chaumont Dame de Chaumont-sur-Yonne, Quenne, Augy et Chitry, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Beatrix de Châlon desde 8 de enero de 1200 hasta 7 de enero de 1201. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1234, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
